## ✨ Highlights

- **Agent Visibility** — A new **All agents / Detected only** toggle in Settings → Agent Paths focuses the app on just the agents you have on this machine. **Detected only** hides and disables every undetected agent — across the Overview, sidebar, Marketplace, and install targets — fully reversibly. Detection is live, too: install or remove an agent and it shows up or disappears without a restart.
